relations.rel: uses as a Remote Access Trojan (RAT)
leverages file attachments to deliver malware

relations.obj: The Taidoor Campaign: An In-Depth Analysis

relations.rel: uses GET requests with obfuscated URL path
uses POST requests with obfuscated URL path
uses 5 random characters for file name
uses 6 pseudorandomly generated characters for request ID
uses custom algorithm to obfuscate MAC address
uses initial C&C server request format
